data.title: Add mono input typography tier to DESIGN.md + migrate ArchiveSearch input to it

data.body: Created from FRAC-21 dialogue (2026-06-08). Human chose to add a new canonical mono input typography tier to DESIGN.md rather than migrate ArchiveSearch input to .text-body-lead (audit's NEAR fit) or keep it audit-divergent. The existing mono utilities (.text-eyebrow/.text-label/.text-meta) are all uppercase tracking-0.1em text-sm — they don't fit a search input (iOS zoom + forces typed text to uppercase). Scope: (a) add a new mono input/UI utility to DESIGN.md → typography utilities table + implement in src/index.css (e.g., .text-input-mono or .text-control: JBM, normal-case, text-base or larger to preserve iOS no-zoom, weight tbd); (b) migrate src/components/lab/ArchiveSearch.tsx:32 input className to use the new utility. FRAC-21 ships the rest of the audit rows; this row is explicitly deferred. Coordinate with FRAC-20's DESIGN.md text-foregrounds pattern for the table format.
